194	      // We use the Vary header to signal this behavior to the client to properly cache the response.

877	  public async handleRequest(
878	    req: ServerRequest,
879	    res: ServerResponse,
880	    parsedUrl?: NextUrlWithParsedQuery
881	  ): Promise<void> {
882	    await this.prepare()
883	    const method = req.method.toUpperCase()
884	    const tracer = getTracer()
885	
886	    return tracer.withPropagatedContext(req.headers, () => {
887	      // Capture the parent span before creating the handleRequest span.
888	      // When deployed with an adapter, the platform's runtime may create its
889	      // own OTEL HTTP server span before Next.js runs. We propagate http.route
890	      // to this parent span so APM tools (e.g. Datadog) can derive the
891	      // resource name correctly.
892	      const parentSpan = tracer.getActiveScopeSpan()
893	
894	      return tracer.trace(
895	        BaseServerSpan.handleRequest,
896	        {
897	          spanName: `${method}`,
898	          kind: SpanKind.SERVER,
899	          attributes: {
900	            'http.method': method,
901	            'http.target': req.url,
902	          },
903	        },
904	        async (span) =>
905	          this.handleRequestImpl(req, res, parsedUrl).finally(() => {
906	            if (!span) return
907	
908	            const isRSCRequest = getRequestMeta(req, 'isRSCRequest') ?? false
909	            span.setAttributes({
910	              'http.status_code': res.statusCode,
911	              'next.rsc': isRSCRequest,
912	            })
913	
914	            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 500) {
915	              // For 5xx status codes: SHOULD be set to 'Error' span status.
916	              // x-ref: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/http/http-spans/#status
917	              span.setStatus({
918	                code: SpanStatusCode.ERROR,
919	              })
920	              // For span status 'Error', SHOULD set 'error.type' attribute.
921	              span.setAttribute('error.type', res.statusCode.toString())
922	            }
923	
924	            const rootSpanAttributes = tracer.getRootSpanAttributes()
925	            // We were unable to get attributes, probably OTEL is not enabled
926	            if (!rootSpanAttributes) return
927	
928	            if (
929	              rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type') !==
930	              BaseServerSpan.handleRequest
931	            ) {
932	              console.warn(
933	                `Unexpected root span type '${rootSpanAttributes.get(
934	                  'next.span_type'
935	                )}'. Please report this Next.js issue https://github.com/vercel/next.js`
936	              )
937	              return
938	            }
939	
940	            const route = rootSpanAttributes.get('next.route')
941	            if (route) {
942	              const name = isRSCRequest
943	                ? `RSC ${method} ${route}`
944	                : `${method} ${route}`
945	
946	              span.setAttributes({
947	                'next.route': route,
948	                'http.route': route,
949	                'next.span_name': name,
950	              })
951	              span.updateName(name)
952	
953	              // Propagate http.route to the parent span if one exists and
954	              // is different from the handleRequest span. This ensures APM
955	              // tools that read attributes from the outermost span (e.g.
956	              // a platform-created HTTP span) can derive the resource name.
957	              if (parentSpan && parentSpan !== span) {
958	                parentSpan.setAttribute('http.route', route)
959	              }
960	            } else {
961	              span.updateName(isRSCRequest ? `RSC ${method}` : `${method}`)
962	            }
963	          })
964	      )
965	    })
966	  }

686	  protected async imageOptimizer(
687	    req: NodeNextRequest,
688	    res: NodeNextResponse,
689	    paramsResult: import('./image-optimizer').ImageParamsResult,
690	    previousCacheEntry?: IncrementalResponseCacheEntry | null
691	  ): Promise<{
692	    buffer: Buffer
693	    contentType: string
694	    maxAge: number
695	    upstreamEtag: string
696	    etag: string
697	  }> {
698	    if (process.env.NEXT_MINIMAL) {
699	      throw new Error(
700	        'invariant: imageOptimizer should not be called in minimal mode'
701	      )
702	    } else {
703	      const { imageOptimizer, fetchExternalImage, fetchInternalImage } =
704	        require('./image-optimizer') as typeof import('./image-optimizer')
705	
706	      const handleInternalReq = async (
707	        newReq: IncomingMessage,
708	        newRes: ServerResponse
709	      ) => {
710	        if (newReq.url === req.url) {
711	          throw new Error(`Invariant attempted to optimize _next/image itself`)
712	        }
713	
714	        if (!this.routerServerHandler) {
715	          throw new Error(`Invariant missing routerServerHandler`)
716	        }
717	
718	        await this.routerServerHandler(newReq, newRes)
719	        return
720	      }
721	
722	      let { href } = paramsResult
723	
724	      if (
725	        process.env.__NEXT_TEST_MODE &&
726	        process.env.IS_TURBOPACK_TEST &&
727	        !paramsResult.isAbsolute
728	      ) {
729	        // Forward the dpl query param from the original /_next/image request to the
730	        // internal static file request so that the static file validation in
731	        // resolve-routes.ts can verify it.
732	        const dpl =
733	          typeof req.url === 'string'
734	            ? new URL(req.url, 'http://n').searchParams.get('dpl')
735	            : undefined
736	        if (dpl) {
737	          href += `${href.includes('?') ? '&' : '?'}dpl=${dpl}`
738	        }
739	      }
740	
741	      const imageUpstream = paramsResult.isAbsolute
742	        ? await fetchExternalImage(
743	            href,
744	            this.nextConfig.images.dangerouslyAllowLocalIP,
745	            this.nextConfig.images.maximumResponseBody,
746	            this.nextConfig.images.maximumRedirects
747	          )
748	        : await fetchInternalImage(
749	            href,
750	            req.originalRequest,
751	            res.originalResponse,
752	            this.nextConfig.images.maximumResponseBody,
753	            handleInternalReq
754	          )
755	
756	      return imageOptimizer(imageUpstream, paramsResult, this.nextConfig, {
757	        isDev: this.dev,
758	        previousCacheEntry,
759	      })
760	    }
761	  }
